text.title: langchain-basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Pick LangChain LCEL vs LangGraph vs raw vendor SDK.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workflow need stateful branching, tool loops, or human-in-the-loop?

branch.conclusion: Use LangGraph; LangChain LCEL is the wrong primitive for stateful work.

branch.question: Is latency more critical than observability and abstraction convenience?

branch.conclusion: Call the vendor SDK directly; LangChain abstraction overhead matters at sub-second SLAs.
Use LangChain LCEL with `with_structured_output()`; pin versions; turn on LangSmith.

text.example: q-stateful → branch(false) → q-latency → branch(false) → conclusion(r1-prefer-structured-output). Build with LCEL.
